channel.title: Comments for page "The Phoenix, The Nightingale, and The Magpies"
channel.description: Posts in the discussion thread "The Phoenix, The Nightingale, and The Magpies"

item.title: Re: Author Post -- HUB -- Part 9 Posted
item.content:encoded: After much delay, the ninth and final installment in this series, A Thorne Is Born, has been posted. This concludes this series, although not the saga of Florence Thorne.

item.title: Re: Author Post -- HUB -- Part 8 Posted, Part 9 Delayed
item.content:encoded:
Part 8, All Skippers Are Bastards, went up on the 27th. This is the beginning of the end, and contains some major plot revelations. I would suggest reading the prior entries before reading it — at the very least, I would read the tales in the Life Under the Lake arc (Individual Efficacy, Finding A Scalpel, and The Greater Good, and Other Necessary Evils).

However, because I have a ton of shit to do irl, I am probably not going to be able to post Part 9 until at least Thursday, May 2nd. It will definitely be up before the end of the week, however.

item.title: Re: Author Post -- HUB -- Part 7 Up
item.content:encoded:
Bit of a delayed notice, but Part 7, The Greater Good, and Other Necessary Evils, actually did go up on Monday after all. It's a bit of a long one, but it's also the last part of the Lake sub-trilogy.

Part 8 is still scheduled for the 26th, although that may get bumped to the 27th. If it is, then Part 9 will get bumped to the 30th.

item.title: Re: Author Post -- HUB -- Part 6 & Schedule Update
item.content:encoded:
Noting here that Part 6, Finding A Scalpel, went up on the 19th. This is the second part of the Life Under the Lake arc.

Part 7, which was initially scheduled for the 22nd, has been bumped back to the 23rd, mostly to give me more time to get final crit and edits on it over the holiday weekend. Part 8 is still scheduled for Friday.

item.title: (no title)
item.content:encoded:
A Gang of Ghosts

We should call it a gaggle of ghosts

item.title: Re: Author Post -- HUB -- Part 5 Up Now
item.content:encoded:
Noting here that Part 5, Individual Efficacy, is now up. This is the first part of the Life Under the Lake arc, which is a series of shortish vignettes detailing Florence's life at Site 246.

Part 6 is still scheduled for the 19th.

item.title: Author Post -- HUB
item.content:encoded:
Lying at my feet I see the offering you bring
The mark of Cain is on our faces, borne of suffering
O, I long to hear you say it's not been wrong
I stand before you now, a riddle in my song
The answer is that sweet refrain
Unheard it always will remain
Beyond our reach, beyond our gain

Kansas — "The Pinnacle"

This one's a few hours early, but it's Monday somewhere in the world. Here's the hub for this series, along with a little epilogue — Pietrykau's comments will start making a lot more sense as the remaining tales arrive, trust me. Now that the hub's up, the title of this series has also been revealed, continuing on with the well established bird motif of Third Law and Twisted Pines. If you haven't already figured out who the Phoenix, Nightingale, and Magpies are, you will soon. Probably.

HUGE thanks to Crashington (art page here) for the art used in the header (and throughout the series). As a work done on commission for this site, it automatically falls under CC-BY-SA 3.0. The rest of the header is my own work, and is also under CC-BY-SA 3.0. The font used for the text in the header is Rock Salt, which is available under the Apache License, Version 2.0.

Here's a close-up of the art in the logo: Link

Crit credits go out to:

  • A Random Day — Moonlighting
  • Jacob Conwell — SCP-4560
  • tawny0

Here's a tentative schedule for the rest of this series:

  • Part 5 — April 17
  • Part 6 — April 19
  • Part 7 — April 22
  • Part 8 — April 26
  • Part 9 — April 29 May 2
